# virtuacloud_offers (Data Source)

List all available cloud server offers from Virtua.Cloud.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `offers` (Attributes List) List of available offers. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--offers))

<a id="nestedatt--offers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `offers`

Read-Only:

- `additional_ipv4_addresses_max` (String) Maximum additional IPv4 addresses.
- `additional_ipv4_addresses_price_hour` (String) Hourly price per additional IPv4 address.
- `additional_ipv4_addresses_price_month` (String) Monthly price per additional IPv4 address.
- `additional_root_space_price_hour` (String) Hourly price per additional GB of root space.
- `additional_root_space_price_month` (String) Monthly price per additional GB of root space.
- `bandwidth` (String) Bandwidth in Mbps.
- `category` (String) Offer category (e.g. vcs, vcs-win).
- `cloud_zone` (Attributes) Cloud zone details for this offer. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--offers--cloud_zone))
- `cpu_family` (String) CPU family (e.g. intel-xeon, amd-epyc, amd-ryzen).
- `is_windows_included` (String) Whether Windows license is included (1=yes, 0=no).
- `memory_size` (String) Memory size in MB.
- `name` (String) Offer name.
- `price_hour` (String) Hourly price.
- `price_month` (String) Monthly price.
- `root_disk_type` (String) Root disk type (ssd or nvme).
- `root_space` (String) Root disk space in GB.
- `uuid` (String) Offer UUID.
- `vcpus` (String) Number of vCPUs.

<a id="nestedatt--offers--cloud_zone"></a>
### Nested Schema for `offers.cloud_zone`

Read-Only:

- `city_name` (String) City name.
- `country_code` (String) Country code.
- `country_name` (String) Country name.
- `datacenter_name` (String) Datacenter name.
- `timezone` (String) Timezone.
